song_name: Saving All My Love For You

Saving All My Love For You

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Saving All My Love For You

recommended.version_description: This version includes the guitar part for the chords you hear from the keyboard. Based of the studio song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PItbZklYYNQ.

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends

content:
Saving All My Love for You (Gerry Goffin/Michael Masser)
(Now altered to the correct key of A)


[Intro]

[ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]E11[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]  [ch]Amaj7[/ch]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]E11[/ch]
A few stolen moments is all that we share[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]E11[/ch]
You've got your family and they need you there.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]B7[/ch]
Though I try to resist being last on your list.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]C#7[/ch]
But no other man's gonna do.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]E11[/ch]
So I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]E11[/ch]
It's not very easy living alone.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]E11[/ch]
My friends try and tell me: Find a man of my own.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]        [ch]B7[/ch]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]
But each time I try I just break down and cry.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]A/E[/ch]     [ch]G#m7[/ch]  [ch]C#7[/ch]
'Cause I'd rather be    home feeling blue.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
So I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]        [ch]C#7[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]
You used to tell me we'd run away together.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]E11[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Love gives you the right to be free.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]         [ch]G#7[/ch]           [ch]C#[/ch]            [ch]C#maj7[/ch]
You said, be patient, just wait a little longer.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]B9[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]E11[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
But that's just an old fantasy.[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]E11[/ch]
I've got to get ready, just a few minutes more.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]        [ch]F#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]               [ch]E11[/ch]
Gonna get that old feeling when you walk through that door.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]
'Cause tonight is the night for feeling alright.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E/G#[/ch]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#7[/ch]
We'll be making love  the  whole night through[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
So I'm saving all my love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Yes I'm saving all my love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch]
Yes I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]            [ch]E11[/ch]
No other woman is gonna love you more.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]             [ch]F#m7[/ch]    [ch]B7[/ch]
'Cause tonight is the night that I'm feeling alright.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E/G#[/ch]       [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#7[/ch]
We'll be making love  the  whole night through[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
So I'm saving all my love[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Yeah I'm saving all my loving[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch]
Darlin', yes, I'm saving all my love for you.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch]
For you.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch]
For you.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]E11[/ch]
For you.[/tab]
